title: Lesson 279: 五味, 寤寐, 込む...

items.gloss: five flavors (sweet, salty, spicy, sour, bitter); five palates; five tastes; five flavors (milk at various stages of making ghee: fresh milk, cream, curdled milk, butter, and ghee); the five periods of the Buddha's teachings
to be crowded; to be packed; to be complex; to go into; to put into; to remain (seated); to be plunged into (silence); to do thoroughly; to do intently; to continue in the same state
(husked grains of) rice; staple (product, etc.); necessity
to see; to look; to watch; to try to
